---
title: "GLEAM full scRNA-seq workflow"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{GLEAM full scRNA-seq workflow}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.align = "center",
  fig.width = 8.4,
  fig.height = 5.8,
  out.width = "92%",
  dpi = 140
)

pkg_root <- if (file.exists("DESCRIPTION")) "." else if (file.exists(file.path("..", "DESCRIPTION"))) ".." else NULL
if (!is.null(pkg_root) && requireNamespace("pkgload", quietly = TRUE)) {
  pkgload::load_all(pkg_root, export_all = FALSE, quiet = TRUE)
} else {
  library(GLEAM)
}

seurat_ok <- requireNamespace("Seurat", quietly = TRUE) && requireNamespace("SeuratObject", quietly = TRUE)
```

## 1) Load Seurat object

```{r step1-load, eval=seurat_ok}
library(Seurat)

ifnb_path <- system.file("extdata", "full_examples", "ifnb_seurat.rds", package = "GLEAM")
if (ifnb_path == "") ifnb_path <- file.path("inst", "extdata", "full_examples", "ifnb_seurat.rds")
seu <- readRDS(ifnb_path)

cells_use <- colnames(seu)[seq_len(min(5000, ncol(seu)))]
seu <- subset(seu, cells = cells_use)

dim(seu)
seu
```

## 2) Set analysis columns and consistent palettes

```{r step2-meta, eval=seurat_ok}
seu$sample <- as.character(seu$orig.ident)
seu$group <- as.character(seu$stim)
seu$celltype <- as.character(seu$seurat_annotations)

celltype_levels <- names(sort(table(seu$celltype), decreasing = TRUE))
group_levels <- unique(seu$group)

seu$celltype <- factor(seu$celltype, levels = celltype_levels)
seu$group <- factor(seu$group, levels = group_levels)

pal_celltype <- setNames(get_palette("gleam_discrete", n = length(celltype_levels), continuous = FALSE), celltype_levels)
pal_group <- setNames(get_palette("brewer_set2", n = length(group_levels), continuous = FALSE), group_levels)

head(seu@meta.data[, c("sample", "group", "celltype")])
```

## 3) Standard Seurat preprocessing

```{r step3-preprocess, eval=seurat_ok}
seu <- NormalizeData(seu, verbose = FALSE)
seu <- FindVariableFeatures(seu, verbose = FALSE)
seu <- ScaleData(seu, verbose = FALSE)
seu <- RunPCA(seu, verbose = FALSE)
seu <- FindNeighbors(seu, dims = 1:20, verbose = FALSE)
seu <- FindClusters(seu, resolution = 0.5, verbose = FALSE)
seu <- RunUMAP(seu, dims = 1:20, verbose = FALSE)
seu <- RunTSNE(seu, dims = 1:20, verbose = FALSE)

ElbowPlot(seu, ndims = 30)
```

## 4) UMAP and tSNE overview

```{r step4-umap-celltype, eval=seurat_ok}
DimPlot(seu, reduction = "umap", group.by = "celltype", cols = pal_celltype, pt.size = 0.35) +
  ggplot2::labs(title = "UMAP by cell type")
```

```{r step4-umap-group, eval=seurat_ok}
DimPlot(seu, reduction = "umap", group.by = "group", cols = pal_group, pt.size = 0.35) +
  ggplot2::labs(title = "UMAP by group")
```

```{r step4-tsne-group, eval=seurat_ok}
DimPlot(seu, reduction = "tsne", group.by = "group", cols = pal_group, pt.size = 0.35) +
  ggplot2::labs(title = "tSNE by group")
```

## 5) Signature scoring

```{r step5-score, eval=seurat_ok}
gs <- get_geneset("hallmark", source = "builtin", species = "human")

sc <- score_signature(
  object = seu,
  geneset = gs,
  geneset_source = "list",
  seurat = TRUE,
  assay = "RNA",
  layer = "data",
  slot = "data",
  method = "ensemble",
  min_genes = 3,
  verbose = FALSE
)

sc$meta$celltype <- factor(as.character(sc$meta$celltype), levels = celltype_levels)
sc$meta$group <- factor(as.character(sc$meta$group), levels = group_levels)

dim(sc$score)
```

## 6) Differential analysis

```{r step6-diff, eval=seurat_ok}
res_pb <- test_signature(
  sc,
  group = "group",
  sample = "sample",
  celltype = "celltype",
  level = "pseudobulk",
  method = "wilcox"
)

top_sig <- res_pb$table$pathway[order(res_pb$table$p_adj)][1]
head(res_pb$table)
top_sig
```

## 7) FeaturePlot-style signature map

```{r step7-featureplot, eval=seurat_ok}
sig_col <- paste0("GLEAM_signature_", gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9_]+", "_", top_sig))
score_values <- rep(NA_real_, ncol(seu))
names(score_values) <- colnames(seu)
overlap_cells <- intersect(colnames(seu), colnames(sc$score))
score_values[overlap_cells] <- as.numeric(sc$score[top_sig, overlap_cells])
seu[[sig_col]] <- score_values

FeaturePlot(
  seu,
  features = sig_col,
  reduction = "umap",
  cols = get_palette("gleam_continuous", n = 128, continuous = TRUE),
  order = TRUE,
  pt.size = 0.7
) + ggplot2::labs(title = paste0("FeaturePlot signature map: ", top_sig))
```

## 8) GLEAM embedding score plot

```{r step8-embedding-score, eval=seurat_ok}
plot_embedding_score(
  sc,
  pathway = top_sig,
  object = seu,
  reduction = "umap",
  point_size = 0.7,
  palette = "gleam_continuous"
)
```

## 9) Dot-bar plot

```{r step9-dotbar, eval=seurat_ok, fig.width=11.8, fig.height=7.2, out.width="100%"}
plot_dot_bar(
  sc,
  by = c("group", "celltype"),
  pathway = top_sig,
  color_palette = "gleam_continuous"
)
```

## 10) Violin plot

```{r step10-violin, eval=seurat_ok, fig.width=10.4, fig.height=6.2}
plot_violin(
  sc,
  pathway = top_sig,
  group = "celltype",
  palette = pal_celltype,
  point_size = 0,
  alpha = 0.75
) + ggplot2::theme(axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(angle = 28, hjust = 1))
```

## 11) Split violin plot

```{r step11-split-violin, eval=seurat_ok, fig.width=10.8, fig.height=6.4}
plot_split_violin(
  sc,
  pathway = top_sig,
  x = "celltype",
  split.by = "group",
  palette = pal_group,
  alpha = 0.72
) + ggplot2::theme(axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(angle = 28, hjust = 1))
```

## 12) Ridge plot

```{r step12-ridge, eval=seurat_ok && requireNamespace("ggridges", quietly = TRUE), fig.width=10.8, fig.height=6.4}
plot_ridge(
  sc,
  pathway = top_sig,
  group = "celltype",
  palette = pal_celltype,
  alpha = 0.75
)
```

## 13) Trajectory-style plots

```{r step13-trajectory-setup, eval=seurat_ok}
seu$pseudotime <- rank(Embeddings(seu, "pca")[, 1], ties.method = "average") / ncol(seu)
seu$lineage <- as.character(seu$celltype)

sc2 <- score_signature(
  object = seu,
  geneset = gs,
  geneset_source = "list",
  seurat = TRUE,
  assay = "RNA",
  layer = "data",
  slot = "data",
  method = "ensemble",
  min_genes = 3,
  verbose = FALSE
)

lineage_levels <- unique(as.character(sc2$meta$lineage))
pal_lineage <- setNames(get_palette("brewer_dark2", n = length(lineage_levels), continuous = FALSE), lineage_levels)
```

```{r step13-pseudotime, eval=seurat_ok}
plot_pseudotime_score(
  sc2,
  pathway = top_sig,
  pseudotime = "pseudotime",
  lineage = "lineage",
  palette = pal_lineage
)
```

```{r step13-trajmap, eval=seurat_ok}
plot_trajectory_score(
  sc2,
  pathway = top_sig,
  object = seu,
  reduction = "umap",
  palette = "gleam_continuous"
)
```
